title: Xtra Fluffy Portuguese Cod Pasta
description: A briny and fluffy Portuguese dish featuring cod, shoyu-koji, and pasta, perfect for a family dinner
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning
Add the cod fillets to the skillet, skin side up, and cook for 3-4 minutes or until the skin is crispy and golden brown
Flip the cod over and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes or until cooked through
In a small bowl, whisk together the shoyu-koji and a pinch of salt and pepper
Add the shoyu-koji mixture to the skillet with the cod and stir to combine
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet with the cod and shoyu-koji mixture
Toss the pasta in the skillet to combine with the cod and shoyu-koji mixture, adding some grated parmesan cheese to taste
